description:
The travel agency has terminated partnerships with three hotel chains. Delete the vertices for Copacabana Palace (Rio de Janeiro, Brazil), Park Hyatt Tokyo (Tokyo, Japan), and Four Seasons Sydney (Sydney, Australia) from the Hotels class in the demodb database. Use the DELETE VERTEX command to ensure all connected edges are properly removed.

OrientDB Studio: http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html
Server credentials: root / GymAnything123!
Database: demodb (admin / admin)
